steps.title: Identify the knowledge gap being addressed
steps.content: The passage states that “little is known about juveniles during their oceanic stage,” then presents research examining this exact stage.

steps.title: Connect the gap to the main purpose
steps.content:
The text's main purpose is to summarize research findings on the understudied oceanic stage.

The other three choices either focus on a secondary detail, misrepresent the scope of comparison, or describe conservation efforts not shown in the passage.

That matches Choice A — To summarize research on an understudied stage of sea turtle development..
